== Notes for [[Item:Q105362|Q105362]] ==

39. ALDEFONSA4 RAMON-GUTIERREZ (JOSEPH3 DE MORALES-Y-RAMON, JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*She married CAPTAIN JUAN DE-LA-PENA.

Child of ALDEFONSA RAMON-GUTIERREZ and JUAN DE-LA-PENA is:
*1. i. FRANCISCO5 DE-LA-PENA-RAMON.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014409979522

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
